problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Thermoelectric. Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
